thread_title: ✅「已回答」基础打防是什么意思

content:
Thank you very much for the rings in the recent D-Tide! As an Ultra main (I do not play any blue), I can actually survive past turn 2 of D-tides now!!!

**Suggestions to help ultra in the endgame**

As a newer player to this game, the end game seem very defense orientated. Which kinda sucks because I do not like playing the tank and wait it out playstyle. So you may end up loosing players like me if all the endgame is, is to have high defense in order to survive.

Here are my suggestions:

1. Can ultra start the beginning of the exploration with a lot more aliemus? To the level where we can exalt each (Ultra units only) awaker the first turn? I think the best way to do this in game is just have the madness omen for ultra provide 2x the amount than any other realm - as it is only used in the endgame then. 

This way, I can have one really big turn 1, and then I have to find a way to survive to my ultra turn.

2. Can ultra realm mastery adds to overall total health? 

I am ok having an **absolutely pathetic amount of defense **(*like 1/10th of what you give to blue*) in pure ultra. If we have a lot more starting health.

This way the gameplay for ultra is come out fast with turn 1. Kill one of those enemies that are doing insane amount of damage that only blue realm can survive.... (*I might be biased*). The gameplay becomes kill really fast or die in 3 turns - which I love!!

If you don't do something to help ultra kill faster, the defense you give to Ultra units is an actual joke in the endgame. There is no way I can survive a 1300dmg hit using a 26 defense card. I have to borrow Chaos units for both defense and life healing survival and it just feels bad. Then a player like me sees all the tools you provide blue and thinks, you are only designing the endgame for blue players and their playstyle. Which will turn off paying customers - like me. Which is the main reason I'm holding back spending more money - if its only blue in the endgame.
